description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt fromwrangler is all set to pump up your style. Pair it with classy formals or jeans and semi-formal shirts. Length: 107 cm Width: 3.8 cm Made of pure leather with a check finish Buckle and holes to customise Fit Brand name embossed on the tail Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
